title: pontia montana
intro: Pontia montana, also known as the Alpine Sawfly or Mountain Butterfly Orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to the mountains of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pontia montana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pontia montana typically involve drying the plant's flowers and leaves, which can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for various health benefits.
